{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323032211A912AF5FF21DD0156043"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612022116135437080","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真好！这篇文章好有意思！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772324807,"group_id":"7589481616074886206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢安静地阅读","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwo2lDIZlOhZ7HaUt1wot20=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2940553374","user_name":"高远"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2940553374","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589481616074886206","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女主+神医+发家致富+暴爽+踩权贵+逆袭人生】
昔日医大骄子张福根，前途光明，却因撞见富二代夺爱，被歹毒算计打成痴傻，人生坠入深渊。痴傻三年，唯有善良嫂子不离不弃，悉心照料，他受尽旁人冷眼，更遭村霸王大彪 暴揍，昏死过去。
绝境之中，他脖颈间祖传的小玉葫芦意外觉醒！玉葫芦蕴藏神异之力，能一眼断生死、辨顽疾，更传承给他绝世针灸神术与顶级中医绝学。一朝清醒，福根涅槃重生，昔日屈辱百倍奉还！
踩恶霸，惩劣官，凭一身医术济世救人，更结识四方权贵名流，步步崛起。从此，医道无双，纵横乡里，快意恩仇，所有欺辱过他的邪恶势力，皆被狠狠踩在脚下！他终将逆转乾坤，手握医术乾坤，走出山村，活出逍遥璀璨的人生！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b5a1015cca1f86db97013a3006ee4be","author":"软萌小兔子乖乖","author_id":"","book_id":"7589481616074886206","book_name":"福根，乡村好快活啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589481673415197246","read_count":"10073","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"138490"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"62","tags":"都市修真,都市,都市异能,神医,打脸,乡村,多女主,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/983e289cc860f00ed9e98b96bd6e1f08~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391331&x-signature=0ZsHLW3Ms6kUFLzFpidsXxp%2BL54%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"
